content.body: At the end of https://tc39.es/ecma262/#sec-asyncblockstart, there's a Note about the possible sources of `_result_`. What I don't understand is, if it's coming from Await, how do you know it's `~unused~`? (Seems more like it would have to be an ES lang value.)
